nasb.text: For I will remove the names of the Baals from her mouth, So that they will be mentioned by their names no more.

esv.text: For I will remove the names of the Baals from her mouth, and they shall be remembered by name no more.

cnv.text: 我要把‘巴力’的名字從她口中除掉； 他們的名字沒有人再提起。

ccb.text: 我要从你口中除掉巴力的名字， 再也不让你提起。
